query: SELECT pv.id, p.name as produit, pv.name as variante, pv."supplierProductCode" as code_fournisseur, pv.ean13, pv."stockQuantity" as en_stock, pv."inTransitQuantity" as en_transit FROM product_variants pv JOIN products p ON pv."productId" = p.id WHERE pv."stockQuantity" > 0 OR pv."inTransitQuantity" > 0 ORDER BY p.name, pv.name LIMIT 20;
